# JSON server edge cases test

# Set aggressive timeouts for edge case testing
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=4s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=3s
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=2s

# Test edge cases and error handling
bash 'echo "Testing JSON edge cases..."'

# Test very large JSON
cat > large.json << EOF
{
  "data": [
EOF

# Add many items to create a larger JSON
bash 'for i in {1..100}; do echo "    {\"id\": $i, \"value\": \"item_$i\"}," >> large.json; done'

cat >> large.json << EOF
    {"id": 101, "value": "item_101"}
  ]
}
EOF

# Test deeply nested JSON
cat > deep_nested.json << EOF
{
  "level1": {
    "level2": {
      "level3": {
        "level4": {
          "level5": {
            "level6": {
              "level7": {
                "level8": {
                  "level9": {
                    "level10": {
                      "deep_value": "found"
                    }
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
EOF

# Test JSON with special characters
cat > special_chars.json << EOF
{
  "unicode": "Hello 世界 🌍",
  "escape_sequences": "Line 1\nLine 2\tTabbed\r\nWindows line ending",
  "quotes": "She said \"Hello\" to him",
  "backslashes": "Path: C:\\Program Files\\App",
  "numbers": {
    "integer": 42,
    "float": 3.14159,
    "scientific": 1.23e-4,
    "negative": -42
  }
}
EOF

# Test empty and minimal JSON
cat > minimal.json << EOF
{}
EOF

# Test array-only JSON
cat > array_only.json << EOF
[1, 2, 3, "test", true, false, null]
EOF

bash 'echo "Testing edge case processing..."'

# Test path extraction edge cases
bash 'echo "Testing path extraction edge cases..."'

# Test formatting edge cases
bash 'echo "Testing formatting edge cases..."'

# Test minification edge cases  
bash 'echo "Testing minification edge cases..."'

bash 'echo "JSON edge cases test complete"'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f large.json deep_nested.json special_chars.json minimal.json array_only.json
